Pima Medical Institute — Paramedic Program

Clinical Capstone
Evaluator Registration

Join our Medical Directors and faculty as an evaluator for the Spring 2026 Paramedic Clinical Capstone assessment.

Day 1
Monday, March 30
0900 – 1700
Day 2
Tuesday, March 31
1300 – 1700
Location
PMI Paramedic Lab
Las Vegas Campus

Evaluators observe live patient scenarios and participate in structured oral board questioning alongside our Medical Directors. A calibration briefing at the start of each session covers everything you need — no advance preparation required. You're welcome to attend any combination of time blocks, for as much time as your schedule allows.

Each time block is capped at 4 outside evaluators. Full blocks are locked.

Loading available time blocks...
I'd like to observe students connected to my agency
Current employees, clinical students placed at your agency, or candidates in your hiring process. We'll do our best to schedule those students during your selected time blocks.

We'll follow up with evaluator materials and a detailed schedule within 48 hours of your registration.

Pima Medical Institute — Paramedic Program
Questions? Contact Benjamin Hartnell — Lead Paramedic Instructor & Clinical Director
